prompt: A wide social/OG hero of the apparatus exploded module on the left and clear negative space on the right for a title. monochrome black ink line drawing on warm off-white paper #EDE9E5, a single brick-orange #E05A2B accent only, corner registration crosshairs, datum target triangles, dimension tolerances and an ISO-style title block; no colour anywhere except the one orange accent. 1960s Bell Labs technical manual crossed with a modern Anduril defense schematic — austere, clinical, exact.
